Your Digital Fortress for Public Browsing

In today's connected world, your digital safety shouldn't be compromised just because you're using a shared computer. SecureSession is your personal digital fortress, transforming any public PC into a secure, private browsing environment with just one click. Whether you're at a library, internet cafe, hotel business center, or any shared space, SecureSession ensures your online activities remain confidential and protected.
Key Features:
🛡️ Instant Armor: Activate a fully secure browsing environment in seconds.
🕵️ Trace Eraser: Automatically wipes all your data when you're done.
⏱️ Time Guardian: Set session durations to match your needs.
🔒 File Fortress: View and manage documents without leaving traces on public PCs.
🌐 SafeNet: Browse with enhanced security protocols.
Whether you're a student researching at the library, a professional checking emails at a business center, or simply someone who values privacy while using shared computers, SecureSession provides peace of mind with every click.
Download SecureSession today and turn any public computer into your personal, secure workspace!

Perfect for:
⦿ Students using campus computers
⦿ Professionals on-the-go
⦿ Library patrons
⦿ Internet cafe visitors
⦿ Anyone using shared or public computers

SecureSession: Your bubble of security in a public digital world.
Disclaimer:
Important: SecureSession is designed to enhance your privacy and security while using public computers, but it is not a complete anonymity solution. While we clear your browsing data from the local machine, your internet service provider, websites you visit, and potential network observers may still be able to track your online activities.

SecureSession does not make you anonymous online, nor does it encrypt your internet connection. For full anonymity and encryption, consider using a VPN in addition to SecureSession.
We strive to provide the highest level of security, but we cannot guarantee complete protection against all potential threats. Users are responsible for their online activities and should always exercise caution when accessing sensitive information on public networks.

Introducing AliImageSaver: Your Ultimate Solution for Saving AliExpress Images & Videos!

Experience the ultimate tool for AliExpress & Alibaba enthusiasts! Our cutting-edge extension, AliImageSaver empowers you to effortlessly save captivating AliExpress images and engaging videos directly to your computer. Prepare to enjoy a seamless journey through the world of online shopping visuals!

Why Choose AliImageSaver?
📸 Instantly download AliExpress images and videos to your device with unparalleled ease.
🖼️ Access top-quality product images with just a single click, ensuring an optimal visual experience.
💡 AliImageSaver is entirely complimentary – take full advantage of its remarkable features at zero cost.

 ▬▬▬▬▬▬ 🚀 GETTING STARTED 🚀 ▬▬▬▬▬▬

1. Install the extension by clicking the “Add to chrome” button.
2. Open an AliExpress product page.
3. Click on the on the icon on the top right of your browser and start downloading!

▬▬▬▬▬▬ 🚀 FEATURES 🚀 ▬▬▬▬▬▬

- Download main product images, variations images and pictures from description
- Save images as ZIP (it’s useful to keep a clean download folder)
- Get the best quality image download
- Support all features on AliExpress AND Alibaba!
- Save time and download ALL images in one click
- Organise downloads with subdirectories
- Open download directory after download
- Right click to download images with the BEST QUALITY possible
- Right click to download REVIEW images
- Save product’s VIDEOS

▬▬▬▬▬ NEED HELP ? ▬▬▬▬▬

If you have any questions, or suggestions to improve the app, please let us know at osvmedia.evan@gmail.com

               ***** ALL FEATURES ARE FREE 4EVER *****

Brings back the download bar across the bottom of every page, like Chrome used to have.
Browse and download images from web pages with filtering options.

### 🔍 强大的图片发现功能
Image Downloader 能智能识别网页中的所有图片资源，包括：
- 常规图片元素
- 背景图片
- 懒加载图片
- 轮播图片
- 隐藏在 CSS 中的图片

无论图片如何隐藏，我们都能找到它！

### ⚡ 高效的筛选系统
- **按尺寸筛选**：只需设置最小图片大小，快速过滤掉小图标和缩略图
- **按格式筛选**：JPG、PNG、WebP、GIF 等格式一键筛选
- **按URL筛选**：通过关键词精确定位特定图片

### 💾 便捷的下载选项
- **批量下载**：一键下载所有筛选后的图片
- **选择性下载**：勾选喜欢的图片进行下载
- **自定义保存路径**：指定图片保存位置，轻松整理素材

### 🛡️ 注重隐私与安全
- **完全本地运行**：所有操作均在本地完成，不收集或上传任何数据
- **零服务器依赖**：无需连接外部服务器，保护您的隐私
- **无广告无追踪**：纯净体验，无任何干扰

### 💻 适用场景
- **设计师**：快速收集设计灵感和素材
- **学生**：下载学习资料和研究图片
- **内容创作者**：为博客、社交媒体寻找合适素材
- **网购爱好者**：批量保存产品图片便于对比
- **旅行爱好者**：一键保存旅行目的地美景

### 🚀 为什么选择 Image Downloader？
- **简单易用**：直观的界面设计，无需专业知识
- **高效稳定**：优化的图片检测算法，迅速识别各种图片资源
- **轻量级**：占用资源少，不影响浏览体验
- **持续更新**：定期推出新功能和优化改进

### 📌 使用小贴士
1. 点击扩展图标打开控制面板
2. 等待图片扫描完成（大型网页可能需要几秒钟）
3. 根据需要设置过滤条件
4. 勾选需要的图片或直接点击"下载全部"
5. 图片将自动保存到指定文件夹

### 🔧 权限说明
- **网页内容访问**：仅用于检测当前页面图片
- **下载权限**：用于保存图片到本地
- **存储权限**：保存您的偏好设置

我们珍视您的隐私，绝不会收集或传输任何个人数据。
